use_cases: Numeric input control for forms requiring quantity or count values
Step counter for inventory management interfaces
Quantity selector in e-commerce shopping cart or product pages
Page navigation control for pagination components
Simple counter for tracking numeric values in dashboards
ai_summary: A minimalist stepper component with increment and decrement buttons that controls a numeric count value. Provides direct user manipulation of numeric data through click interactions. Commonly used as a quantity selector in e-commerce, inventory controls in admin panels, or as a standalone counter in various UI contexts. Clean implementation with React useState for state management.
